title: epipactis leptochila var. neglecta
intro: Epipactis leptochila var. neglecta, also known as the Yellow Form of the Broad-leaved Helleborine, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epipactis leptochila var. neglecta include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Epipactis leptochila var. neglecta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, although its availability is limited due to its rarity and protected status.
